CopyCustomDBEngineVersion.description: Grants permission to copy a custom engine version

CopyDBParameterGroup.description: Grants permission to copy the specified DB parameter group

CopyDBSnapshot.description: Grants permission to copy the specified DB snapshot

CopyOptionGroup.name: CopyOptionGroup
CopyOptionGroup.description: Grants permission to copy the specified option group

CreateBlueGreenDeployment.description: Grants permission to create a blue-green deployment for a given source cluster or instance

CreateCustomDBEngineVersion.description: Grants permission to create a custom engine version

CreateDBClusterParameterGroup.description: Grants permission to create a new DB cluster parameter group

CreateDBClusterSnapshot.description: Grants permission to create a snapshot of a DB cluster

CreateDBParameterGroup.description: Grants permission to create a new DB parameter group

CreateDBProxyEndpoint.description: Grants permission to create a database proxy endpoint

CreateDBSnapshot.description: Grants permission to create a DBSnapshot

CreateDBSubnetGroup.description: Grants permission to create a new DB subnet group

CreateIntegration.description: Grants permission to create an Aurora zero-ETL integration with Redshift

CreateOptionGroup.name: CreateOptionGroup
CreateOptionGroup.description: Grants permission to create a new option group

CreateTenantDatabase.description: Grants permission to create a new tenant database

DescribeDBMajorEngineVersions.description: Grants permission to return information specific for each DB major engine versions

DescribeDBParameterGroups.description: Grants permission to return a list of DBParameterGroup descriptions

DescribeDBParameters.description: Grants permission to return the detailed parameter list for a particular DB parameter group

DescribeDBSecurityGroups.description: Grants permission to return a list of DBSecurityGroup descriptions

ModifyDBSubnetGroup.description: Grants permission to modify an existing DB subnet group

PurchaseReservedDBInstancesOffering.description: Grants permission to purchase a reserved DB instance offering

RemoveRoleFromDBCluster.description: Grants permission to disassociate an AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) role from an Amazon Aurora DB cluster

RemoveSourceIdentifierFromSubscription.description: Grants permission to remove a source identifier from an existing RDS event notification subscription

ResetDBClusterParameterGroup.description: Grants permission to modify the parameters of a DB cluster parameter group to the default value

ResetDBParameterGroup.description: Grants permission to modify the parameters of a DB parameter group to the engine/system default value

RestoreDBClusterFromS3.name: RestoreDBClusterFromS3
RestoreDBClusterFromS3.description: Grants permission to create an Amazon Aurora DB cluster from data stored in an Amazon S3 bucket

RestoreDBClusterFromSnapshot.description: Grants permission to create a new DB cluster from a DB cluster snapshot

RestoreDBClusterToPointInTime.description: Grants permission to restore a DB cluster to an arbitrary point in time

RestoreDBInstanceFromDBSnapshot.description: Grants permission to create a new DB instance from a DB snapshot

RestoreDBInstanceFromS3.description: Grants permission to create a new DB instance from an Amazon S3 bucket

RestoreDBInstanceToPointInTime.name: RestoreDBInstanceToPointInTime
RestoreDBInstanceToPointInTime.description: Grants permission to restore a DB instance to an arbitrary point in time

RevokeDBSecurityGroupIngress.description: Grants permission to revoke ingress from a DBSecurityGroup for previously authorized IP ranges or EC2 or VPC Security Groups

StartActivityStream.description: Grants permission to start Activity Stream

StopDBInstance.description: Grants permission to stop the DB instance

StopDBInstanceAutomatedBackupsReplicatio.name: StopDBInstanceAutomatedBackupsReplication
StopDBInstanceAutomatedBackupsReplicatio.description: Grants permission to stop automated backup replication for a DB instance

SwitchoverBlueGreenDeployment.description: Grants permission to switch a blue-green deployment from source instance or cluster to target

SwitchoverGlobalCluster.description: Grants permission to switchover a global cluster

SwitchoverReadReplica.name: SwitchoverReadReplica
SwitchoverReadReplica.description: Grants permission to switch over a read replica, making it the new primary database

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.name: aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}
aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the set of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.name: aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}
aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the set of tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.name: aws:TagKeys
aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the set of tag keys in the request

rds:BackupTarget.name: rds:BackupTarget
rds:BackupTarget.description: Filters access by the type of backup target. One of: region, outposts

rds:CopyOptionGroup.name: rds:CopyOptionGroup
rds:CopyOptionGroup.description: Filters access by the value that specifies whether the CopyDBSnapshot action requires copying the DB option group

rds:DatabaseClass.name: rds:DatabaseClass
rds:DatabaseClass.description: Filters access by the type of DB instance class

rds:DatabaseEngine.name: rds:DatabaseEngine
rds:DatabaseEngine.description: Filters access by the database engine. For possible values refer to the engine parameter in CreateDBInstance API

rds:DatabaseName.name: rds:DatabaseName
rds:DatabaseName.description: Filters access by the user-defined name of the database on the DB instance

rds:EndpointType.name: rds:EndpointType
rds:EndpointType.description: Filters access by the type of the endpoint. One of: READER, WRITER, CUSTOM

rds:ManageMasterUserPassword.name: rds:ManageMasterUserPassword
rds:ManageMasterUserPassword.description: Filters access by the value that specifies whether RDS manages master user password in AWS Secrets Manager for the DB instance or cluster

rds:MultiAz.name: rds:MultiAz
rds:MultiAz.description: Filters access by the value that specifies whether the DB instance runs in multiple Availability Zones. To indicate that the DB instance is using Multi-AZ, specify true

rds:Piops.name: rds:Piops
rds:Piops.description: Filters access by the value that contains the number of Provisioned IOPS (PIOPS) that the instance supports. To indicate a DB instance that does not have PIOPS enabled, specify 0

rds:PubliclyAccessible.name: rds:PubliclyAccessible
rds:PubliclyAccessible.description: Filters access by the value that specifies whether the DB Instance or DB ShardGroup is publicly accessible

rds:StorageEncrypted.name: rds:StorageEncrypted
rds:StorageEncrypted.description: Filters access by the value that specifies whether the DB instance storage should be encrypted. To enforce storage encryption, specify true

rds:StorageSize.name: rds:StorageSize
rds:StorageSize.description: Filters access by the storage volume size (in GB)

rds:TagsFromRequest.name: rds:TagsFromRequest
rds:TagsFromRequest.description: Filters access for rds:AddTagsToResource based on whether tags are explicitly specified in the Tags or TagSpecification request parameters. Evaluates to true when tags are provided in these parameters. Evaluates as false when tags are implicitly inherited from source resources

rds:TenantDatabaseName.name: rds:TenantDatabaseName
rds:TenantDatabaseName.description: Filters access by the tenant database name in CreateTenantDatabase and by the new tenant database name in ModifyTenantDatabase

rds:Vpc.name: rds:Vpc
rds:Vpc.description: Filters access by the value that specifies whether the DB instance runs in an Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (Amazon VPC). To indicate that the DB instance runs in an Amazon VPC, specify true

rds:cluster-pg-tag/${TagKey}.name: rds:cluster-pg-tag/${TagKey}
rds:cluster-pg-tag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tag attached to a DB cluster parameter group

rds:cluster-snapshot-tag/${TagKey}.name: rds:cluster-snapshot-tag/${TagKey}
rds:cluster-snapshot-tag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tag attached to a DB cluster snapshot

rds:cluster-tag/${TagKey}.name: rds:cluster-tag/${TagKey}
rds:cluster-tag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tag attached to a DB cluster

rds:db-tag/${TagKey}.name: rds:db-tag/${TagKey}
rds:db-tag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tag attached to a DB instance

rds:es-tag/${TagKey}.name: rds:es-tag/${TagKey}
rds:es-tag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tag attached to an event subscription

rds:og-tag/${TagKey}.name: rds:og-tag/${TagKey}
rds:og-tag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tag attached to a DB option group

rds:pg-tag/${TagKey}.name: rds:pg-tag/${TagKey}
rds:pg-tag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tag attached to a DB parameter group

rds:req-tag/${TagKey}.name: rds:req-tag/${TagKey}
rds:req-tag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the set of tag keys and values that can be used to tag a resource

rds:ri-tag/${TagKey}.name: rds:ri-tag/${TagKey}
rds:ri-tag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tag attached to a reserved DB instance

rds:secgrp-tag/${TagKey}.name: rds:secgrp-tag/${TagKey}
rds:secgrp-tag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tag attached to a DB security group

rds:snapshot-tag/${TagKey}.name: rds:snapshot-tag/${TagKey}
